sigWerErrors.reason: '再' (again) and '在' (at/in) are different words in Chinese. In this context, '你再说什么呀' means 'What are you saying again?', while '你在说什么呀' means 'What are you saying?'. The substitution slightly changes the nuance but does not derail the overall meaning of the sentence.
